name: StudySync
oneLineDescription: AI-powered study and collaboration platform for students
whatItIs: StudySync is a web-based platform for students to organize study schedules, collaborate with peers, and receive AI-assisted learning suggestions. It combines task management, study tracking, and intelligent recommendations to help students stay productive.
coreUserFlows: Register with email/password and create student profile with study preferences
Create structured study sessions with subjects, duration, and tasks, then track completed sessions
Follow peers and view their study activity in an activity feed with likes and comments
Generate AI-powered study plans and receive learning suggestions (paid tier only)
outOfScope: AI question answering or tutoring (beyond text suggestions)

dataModel.purpose: Stores student profiles with authentication and study preferences
Stores structured study sessions created by users
Tracks completed study sessions with progress data
Stores predefined subject and task library
Stores peer follow relationships between users
Stores user comments on study sessions
Stores user likes on study sessions

crossCuttingPrinciples: Free tier limits users to 5 active study sessions and limited AI usage, while paid tier ($10/month) provides unlimited sessions and full AI features
All user-generated content must pass AI-powered moderation checks for hate speech, spam, and abuse
Mobile-responsive design with mobile-first approach and specific breakpoints at 640px and 1024px
WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance with keyboard navigation and screen reader support
AI usage is rate-limited to 10 requests per hour per user with safety and productivity warnings
specSummary: StudySync is designed as a comprehensive study management platform that bridges individual productivity with social learning. The platform centers around structured study sessions where students define subjects, duration, and specific tasks, then log their completed work to build detailed progress tracking. A key differentiator is the peer collaboration aspect—users can follow other students and see their study activity in a chronological feed, fostering accountability through likes and comments on study sessions. The AI integration provides two main value propositions: personalized study plan generation based on user preferences and subject-specific learning tips, both restricted to paid subscribers. The freemium model creates clear upgrade incentives by limiting free users to five active study sessions and basic AI access, while Pro subscribers get unlimited sessions and full AI features for $10 monthly. Technical implementation leverages Next.js 14 with Supabase for authentication and data persistence, OpenAI for AI features, and Stripe for subscription management. The platform maintains strict content moderation through AI-powered filtering and emphasizes mobile-responsive design to serve students across devices. Core constraints include performance targets under 3 seconds on 3G connections, comprehensive accessibility compliance, and robust security through HTTPS and row-level security policies.
